source:
users_raw = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(USERS_PATH)
)

print("Users rows:", users_raw.count())
print("Users columns:", users_raw.columns)

display(users_raw.limit(20))

entra_json = (
    spark.read
    .option("multiLine", True)
    .json(ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH)
)

# detect broken JSON
only_corrupt = (
    entra_json.columns == ["_corrupt_record"]
    or set(entra_json.columns) == {"_corrupt_record"}
)

if only_corrupt:
    print("Falling back to text parse...")

    txt = spark.read.text(ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH)

    blob = (
        txt.agg(F.concat_ws("\n", F.collect_list("value")).alias("json_blob"))
           .collect()[0]["json_blob"]
    )

    m = re.search(r'"value"\s*:\s*(\[[\s\S]*\])', blob)
    if not m:
        raise Exception("Could not extract value array")

    value_array = m.group(1)

    entra_json = spark.read.json(
        spark.sparkContext.parallelize([f'{{"value": {value_array}}}'])
    )

print("Entra rows:", entra_json.count())
print("Entra columns:", entra_json.columns)

users_clean = (
    users_raw
    .withColumn("legacyId", clean_str("ID"))
    .withColumn("userLogin", clean_str("Name"))
    .withColumn("firstName", clean_str("FirstName"))
    .withColumn("lastName", clean_str("LastName"))
    .withColumn("email", F.lower(clean_str("MailAddress")))
    .withColumn(
        "userLogin",
        F.regexp_replace(F.col("userLogin"), r"\s*\(Delete\).*", "")
    )
    .withColumn(
        "displayName",
        F.concat_ws(" ", F.col("firstName"), F.col("lastName"))
    )
)

print("Users clean rows:", users_clean.count())
print("Users clean columns:", users_clean.columns)

display(
    users_clean.select(
        "legacyId",
        "userLogin",
        "firstName",
        "lastName",
        "displayName",
        "email"
    ).limit(20)

entra_clean = (
    entra_raw
    .withColumn("id", clean_str("id"))
    .withColumn("mail", F.lower(clean_str("mail")))
    .withColumn("userPrincipalName", F.lower(clean_str("userPrincipalName")))
    .withColumn("employeeId", clean_str("employeeId"))
    .withColumn("displayName", clean_str("displayName"))
    .withColumn("givenName", clean_str("givenName"))
    .withColumn("surname", clean_str("surname"))
)

print("Entra clean rows:", entra_clean.count())
print("Entra clean columns:", entra_clean.columns)

display(entra_clean.limit(20))

users_matched = (
    users_clean.alias("u")
    .join(
        entra_clean.alias("e"),
        F.col("u.email") == F.col("e.mail"),
        "left"
    )
)

print("Matched rows:", users_matched.count())
display(
    users_matched.select(
        F.col("u.legacyId"),
        F.col("u.userLogin"),
        F.col("u.displayName").alias("sourceDisplayName"),
        F.col("u.email").alias("sourceEmail"),
        F.col("e.id").alias("entraId"),
        F.col("e.displayName").alias("entraDisplayName"),
        F.col("e.mail").alias("entraMail")
    ).limit(50)

users_final = (
    users_matched
    .withColumn("email_final", F.coalesce(F.col("e.mail"), F.col("u.email")))
    .withColumn("idpUserIdGuid", F.col("e.id"))
    .withColumn("displayName_final", F.coalesce(F.col("e.displayName"), F.col("u.displayName")))
    .withColumn("givenName_final", F.coalesce(F.col("e.givenName"), F.col("u.firstName")))
    .withColumn("surname_final", F.coalesce(F.col("e.surname"), F.col("u.lastName")))
    .withColumn("userPrincipalName_final", F.col("e.userPrincipalName"))

w = Window.partitionBy(F.col("u.legacyId")).orderBy(
    F.when(F.col("idpUserIdGuid").isNotNull(), 1).otherwise(2),
    F.when(F.col("email_final").isNotNull(), 1).otherwise(2)
)

users_dedup = (
    users_final
    .withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
    .filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
)

print("Dedup rows:", users_dedup.count())

users_final_out = (
    users_dedup
    .drop("id")
    .withColumn(
        "userGuid",
        uuid_udf(
            F.coalesce(
                F.col("idpUserIdGuid"),
                F.col("email_final"),
                F.col("legacyId")
            )
        )
    )
)

print("users_final_out columns:", users_final_out.columns)

users_load = (
    users_final_out
    .withColumn(
        "idpUserIdGuid_final",
        F.when(
            F.col("idpUserIdGuid").isNull() |
            (F.trim(F.col("idpUserIdGuid")) == "") |
            (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("idpUserIdGuid"))) == "undefined"),
            F.col("displayName_final")
        ).otherwise(F.col("idpUserIdGuid"))
    )
    .select(
        F.col("userGuid").alias("id"),
        F.col("legacyId"),
        F.col("userLogin"),
        F.col("displayName_final").alias("displayNames"),
        F.col("givenName_final").alias("givenName"),
        F.col("surname_final").alias("surname"),
        F.col("email_final").alias("email"),
        F.col("userPrincipalName_final").alias("userPrincipalName"),
        F.col("idpUserIdGuid_final").alias("idpUserIdGuid")
    )
)

print("Users for load rows:", users_load.count())
display(users_load.limit(50))

from pyspark.sql.window import Window

users_stage = (
    users_final_out
    .withColumn(
        "idpUserIdGuid_final",
        F.when(
            F.col("idpUserIdGuid").isNull() |
            (F.trim(F.col("idpUserIdGuid")) == "") |
            (F.lower(F.trim(F.col("idpUserIdGuid"))) == "undefined"),
            F.col("displayName_final")
        ).otherwise(F.col("idpUserIdGuid"))
    )
)

# Deduplicate by idpUserIdGuid_final
w2 = Window.partitionBy("idpUserIdGuid_final").orderBy(
    F.when(F.col("email_final").isNotNull(), 1).otherwise(2),
    F.when(F.col("userPrincipalName_final").isNotNull(), 1).otherwise(2),
    F.col("legacyId")
)

users_dedup_final = (
    users_stage
    .withColumn("rn2", F.row_number().over(w2))
    .filter(F.col("rn2") == 1)
    .drop("rn2")
)

#  Final output
users_load = (
    users_dedup_final
    .select(
        F.col("userGuid").alias("id"),
        F.col("legacyId"),
        F.col("userLogin"),
        F.col("displayName_final").alias("displayNames"),
        F.col("givenName_final").alias("givenName"),
        F.col("surname_final").alias("surname"),
        F.col("email_final").alias("email"),
        F.col("userPrincipalName_final").alias("userPrincipalName"),
        F.col("idpUserIdGuid_final").alias("idpUserIdGuid")
    )
)

print("Users for load rows:", users_load.count())
display(users_load.limit(50))
